intro.title: AI Personality Test
intro.subtitle: Which AI model matches your personality?

question.0: How do you approach a new project?
question.1: When facing a complex problem, you...
question.1a: Break it down step by step logically
question.1b: Dig deep to find the root cause
question.2: Your preferred way of creative expression?
question.5a: Adaptable supporter who fills any gap
question.5c: Independent contributor doing your own thing
question.6: How do you learn new things?
question.8: Your view on the future of technology?

result.percentile: Only {pct} of all participants are the {type} type

gpt.name: GPT - The Versatile Communicator
gpt.tagline: Flexible and articulate in every conversation
gpt.description: You're like GPT - versatile, articulate, and adaptable. You can engage with any topic, communicate clearly, and connect with people effortlessly. Your balanced perspective and quick adaptability are your greatest strengths.

claude.name: Claude - The Thoughtful Analyst
claude.tagline: Understanding the world through deep insight
claude.description: You're like Claude - thoughtful, analytical, and nuanced. You see beyond the surface, value honesty and careful reasoning. Your depth of thought and ethical consideration set you apart from the crowd.

gemini.name: Gemini - The Creative Explorer
gemini.tagline: Exploring every possibility with boundless curiosity
gemini.description: You're like Gemini - endlessly curious, multi-modal, and innovative. You seamlessly move between ideas, images, and concepts, driven by an insatiable desire to explore and discover new connections.

midjourney.name: Midjourney - The Visual Dreamer
midjourney.description: You're like Midjourney - aesthetically gifted with a rich imagination. You understand the world through beauty and visual storytelling, possessing a unique artistic worldview that others find inspiring.

dalle.name: DALL-E - The Playful Creator
dalle.tagline: Making the new through fun and experimentation
dalle.description: You're like DALL-E - experimental, playful, and always creating something new. You approach challenges like a game, combining unexpected elements with joyful creativity to produce surprising results.

copilot.name: Copilot - The Efficient Helper
copilot.description: You're like Copilot - practical, systematic, and efficiency-driven. You value getting things done well and find deep satisfaction in helping others achieve better results through your organized approach.

perplexity.name: Perplexity - The Knowledge Seeker
perplexity.description: You're like Perplexity - driven by an unquenchable thirst for knowledge. One question leads to ten more. You have a passion for deep research, accurate information, and discovering hidden connections.

stable.name: Stable Diffusion - The Open Innovator
stable.description: You're like Stable Diffusion - independent, community-oriented, and believing in open innovation. You solve problems your own way, value freedom, and contribute to a shared knowledge ecosystem.

share.text: My AI personality is '{type}'! Which AI are you?
